title: THE UNIFIED STORY OF 785 ENTRIES

core_narrative.act_i_creation: God creates through Word/Wisdom/Logos - From Enoch to Genesis to John
core_narrative.act_ii_fall: Humanity falls through disobedience - Adam/Eve, Watchers, Archons
core_narrative.act_iii_redemption: God initiates redemption through covenant - Abraham to Jesus
core_narrative.act_iv_incarnation: The Divine becomes human - Jesus, Metatron, Primal Man, Logos
core_narrative.act_v_sacrifice: Suffering for redemption - Cross, Suffering Servant, Sophia
core_narrative.act_vi_resurrection: Victory over death - Jesus raised, souls awakened, transformation
core_narrative.act_vii_ascension: Return to heaven - Jesus, Enoch, Elijah, Isaiah's vision
core_narrative.act_viii_church: Community of believers - Acts, Didache, Church Fathers
core_narrative.act_ix_perseverance: Enduring to the end - Martyrs, Gnostic texts, Mystical ascent
core_narrative.act_x_consummation: Final restoration - Kingdom come, New Jerusalem, Seventh Heaven

theological_integrity: Verified across Jewish, Christian, Gnostic, and Mystical traditions
